name: KPI Weekly Digest — Monday 08:00 GMT
notes: Runs every Monday at 08:00 GMT. Queries v_gate_tracker and v_supplement_mrr, formats a plain-text KPI digest, and emails it to Keith. 2026-05-19: deposit metric removed (mechanic shelved 2026-05-08) — now reports non-cash founding-member list opt-ins via v_gate_tracker.fm_list_optins. Requires the updated pipeline_overview.sql view applied to the target DB. 2026-05-19: removed all environment-variable references (n8n on the VPS does not expose them) — Supabase auth via bound 'Supabase Service Role' httpCustomAuth credential; digest recipient hardcoded; Supabase project URL baked in (phqrjtnflovicgkngieu).
